basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 1 Junior Research Fellow post under Prof. Sharad Gupta with consolidated remuneration up to Rs. 36,000/- per month (with GATE/NET).

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the eligibility as per Funding Agency norms. | Essential Qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course (B.Tech/M.Tech/B.Sc./M.Sc. or equivalent in Biotechnology, Biological Sciences, Biomedical Engineering, Chemistry, or related disciplines) selected through a process described through any one of the following: | (a) Scholars selected through NET – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship and GATE. (b) Selection through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies (DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.). | Desirable Qualification/Experience: | Prior relevant experience with Mammalian Cell culture, cell-based assays, and Fluorescence Microscopy. Good communication skills.

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only. No other mode of application will be accepted. The entire application process is through the official IIT Gandhinagar project staff recruitment portal.
Step-by-Step Application Process:
Visit the Official Application Portal Go to: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/
Register / Login New users must register with a valid Email ID and Mobile Number. Existing users can log in with their credentials.
Fill the Online Application Form Carefully fill all required fields including personal details, educational qualifications, experience, and project-specific information.

Upload Required Documents Scan and upload the following documents (as per institute guidelines): Recent passport-size photograph Signature Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) / Resume All educational certificates and mark sheets (from 10th onwards) GATE/NET scorecard (if applicable) Experience certificates (if any) Any other relevant documents (research papers, certificates, etc.)
Recent passport-size photograph
Signature
Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) / Resume
All educational certificates and mark sheets (from 10th onwards)
GATE/NET scorecard (if applicable)
Experience certificates (if any)
Any other relevant documents (research papers, certificates, etc.)
Preview and Submit Review all entered details carefully before final submission. Once submitted, no changes will be allowed in most cases.
Take Printout After successful submission, download and print the application form for future reference. You do not need to send the hard copy unless called for interview.
Important Points to Remember:
Candidates should have a valid and active Email ID and Mobile Number till the completion of the recruitment process.
Apply well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues.
Only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for further selection process (interview/presentation).
No application fee is mentioned for this position.
Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.
For any technical/query-related issues, contact Prof. Sharad Gupta at [email protected]
important_instructions: This is a temporary position for the project duration only. Appointment is initially for 6 months and extendable based on performance. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further selection process (if any). Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of interview/joining.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting 1 Junior Research Fellow post under Prof. Sharad Gupta with consolidated remuneration up to Rs. 36,000/- per month (with GATE/NET).

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_gandhinag: Targeted Protein Degradation of TDP43: Target validation and development of therapeutics against triple negative breast cancer
Rs. 23,213/- (Without GATE/NET) Rs. 36,000/- (With GATE/NET including HRA)
From date of joining to 6 months (Extendable)

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill the eligibility as per Funding Agency norms. Essential Qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science OR Graduate / Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course (B.Tech/M.Tech/B.Sc./M.Sc. or equivalent in Biotechnology, Biological Sciences, Biomedical Engineering, Chemistry, or related disciplines) selected through a process described through any one of the following: (a) Scholars selected through NET – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship and GATE. (b) Selection through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies (DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MoE, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, NISER etc.). Desirable Qualification/Experience: Prior relevant experience with Mammalian Cell culture, cell-based assays, and Fluorescence Microscopy. Good communication skills.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: The successful candidate will assist in: Initiation and maintenance of Mammalian cell culture. Transfection, clone screening, protein expression, cell-based assays. Preparation of cell samples for microscopic analysis. Fluorescence imaging and quantitative image analysis. Organizing research data, managing databases, preparing reports and presentations. Maintaining documents and assisting with laboratory operations. Ensuring proper organization of the lab workspace.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates shall apply online only. No other mode of application will be accepted. The entire application process is through the official IIT Gandhinagar project staff recruitment portal. Step-by-Step Application Process: Visit the Official Application Portal Go to: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ Register / Login New users must register with a valid Email ID and Mobile Number. Existing users can log in with their credentials. Fill the Online Application Form Carefully fill all required fields including personal details, educational qualifications, experience, and project-specific information. Upload Required Documents Scan and upload the following documents (as per institute guidelines): Recent passport-size photograph Signature Updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) / Resume All educational certificates and mark sheets (from 10th onwards) GATE/NET scorecard (if applicable) Experience certificates (if any) Any other relevant documents (research papers, certificates, etc.) Preview and Submit Review all entered details carefully before final submission. Once submitted, no changes will be allowed in most cases. Take Printout After successful submission, download and print the application form for future reference. You do not need to send the hard copy unless called for interview. Important Points to Remember: Candidates should have a valid and active Email ID and Mobile Number till the completion of the recruitment process. Apply well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues. Only shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for further selection process (interview/presentation). No application fee is mentioned for this position. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For any technical/query-related issues, contact Prof. Sharad Gupta at [email protected]

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is a temporary position for the project duration only. Appointment is initially for 6 months and extendable based on performance. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further selection process (if any). Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of interview/joining.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. 2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the JRF position in the Biological Sciences and Engineering department.

faq.question: Q3. 3. What is the salary for IITGN JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration is Rs. 23,213/- per month (without GATE/NET) and Rs. 36,000/- per month (with GATE/NET including HRA).

faq.question: Q4. 4. What is the essential qualification for IIT Gandhinagar JRF position?
faq.answer: Post Graduate Degree in Basic Science or Professional Course (Biotechnology, Biological Sciences, Biomedical Engg., Chemistry etc.) selected via NET/GATE or equivalent national level exams.

faq.question: Q5. 5. Is GATE or NET mandatory for IIT Gandhinagar JRF 2026?
faq.answer: No, it is not mandatory but candidates with GATE/NET will receive higher remuneration (Rs. 36,000/-).

faq.question: Q6. 6. What is the project title for this JRF recruitment at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Targeted Protein Degradation of TDP43: Target validation and development of therapeutics against triple negative breast cancer.

faq.question: Q7. 7. Who is the Principal Investigator (PI) for this JRF project?
faq.answer: Prof. Sharad Gupta, Department of Biological Sciences and Engineering.

faq.question: Q8. 8. What experience is desirable for the IITGN JRF post?
faq.answer: Prior hands-on experience in Mammalian Cell Culture, cell-based assays, and Fluorescence Microscopy is highly desirable.

faq.question: Q9. 9. How to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Apply online through the official portal: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ before 08-07-2026.

faq.question: Q10. 10. What is the duration of the JRF appointment at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Initial appointment is for 6 months from the date of joining and is extendable based on performance and project requirements.
